ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "city_type" TEXT /* Type of the city (e.g., Urban, Suburban) */,
  "average_fare" REAL /* Average fare in dollars for rides in the city */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Peak hours of the city (e.g., 7-9 am, 4-6 pm) */,
  "off_peak_hours" TEXT /* Off-peak hours of the city */,
  "city_population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "city_area" REAL /* Area of the city in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the driver operates */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average customer rating of the driver */,
  "driver_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "driver_email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rides" (
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who completed the ride */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the ride took place */,
  "fare" REAL /* Total fare for the ride */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the ride in minutes */,
  "ride_date" TEXT /* Date the ride was completed */,
  "pickup_location" TEXT /* Pickup location of the ride */,
  "dropoff_location" TEXT /* Dropoff location of the ride */,
  "ride_type" TEXT /* Type of ride (e.g., Economy, Premium, Pool) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ride associated with the rating */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who gave the rating */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating value (1 to 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Optional comment provided by the customer */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ride_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride request */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the request */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the ride is requested */,
  "requested_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., Now, Later, Schedule) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_requests_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_requests_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare structure */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the fare applies */,
  "base_fare" REAL /* Base fare for starting a ride */,
  "per_mile_rate" REAL /* Cost per mile for the ride */,
  "minimum_fare" REAL /* Minimum fare for any ride */,
  "fare_type" TEXT /* Type of fare (e.g., Economy, Premium, Pool) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the driver is available */,
  "available_from" TEXT /* Start time of availability */,
  "available_to" TEXT /* End time of availability */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Status of availability (e.g., Available, Busy, Offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_availability_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_availability_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promo_code" TEXT /* Code for the promotion */,
  "discount_percent" REAL /* Discount percentage offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promo_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., Ride, Referral, Event) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback submission */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride related to the feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who submitted the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* The feedback message from the customer */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient (could be driver or customer) */,
  "recipient_type" TEXT /* Type of recipient ('driver' or 'customer') */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Ride, Promotion, Alert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., Operations, Marketing, Finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE " driver_earnings" (
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earning record */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride */,
  "fare" REAL /* Total fare for the ride */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the ride was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document record */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., License, Insurance) */,
  "document_number" TEXT /* Number of the document */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_documents_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)
